description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian, depicted with a casual urban appearance. He is wearing a short-sleeved t-shirt and a pair of fitted jeans, complemented by low-top sneakers. His arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and his hands are open with fingers naturally spaced. The figure has a short, neatly styled haircut and a neutral facial expression. The proportions and posture suggest a healthy, average build suitable for walking or standing in public spaces. The overall look is modern and typical for city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure in a t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure has a short hairstyle and a neutral, relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full details of the t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, t-shirt, jeans, and both shoes from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the clothing from the opposite side.
